function.name: convert_time_zone
function.long_description: Converts a given date and time from one time zone to another using live time zone offset data from an external time API.

time_str.description: Date and time in format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM

example_user_queries: What is 07:15 in UTC when converted to Australia/Sydney?
Convert time_str 15:40 from_timezone Europe/Berlin to to_timezone Asia/Dubai.
Convert 11:55 PM from Asia/Singapore to America/Vancouver.
What does 2026-09-14 05:25 become in Pacific/Auckland if the source zone is UTC?
